title: Sea Horses
description: Makes some tropical fish look like sea horses
body:
Makes about 10% of tropical fish look like sea horses.

You can also rename a tropical fish to make it look like a sea horse.

The features of this pack are also included in creatures+:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creatures+

![idle and swimming animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3iTV29O0/images/25430ceb5949bc5a115166de41e9c13b4213ded3.gif)
